workflow_file: Linkedin Update using RAG - RM Apr 5.json
title: LinkedIn updates with RAG (schedule + search)
n8n_workflow_name: Linkedin Update using RAG - RM Apr 5
summary: Manual-run AI agent that follows a weekday content schedule: searches with Gemini, references a sample post from Google Docs (RAG-style), then drafts and posts to LinkedIn. Uses date/time to pick the topic for the current day.
integrations: OpenRouter — chat model for the agent
Google Docs — sample post / reference content
Date & Time tool — weekday topic selection
credentials_required: OpenRouter API (or equivalent for the OpenRouter chat node)
Google Docs / Google account access for Docs tool
notes: After import, reconnect credentials and verify Google Docs document access for the sample-post tool.
